articles.title: Crypto Prices May 2: Crypto Rebound as Fed Hits Pause Button
articles.description: Bitcoin ETFs experienced significant discounts on their underlying assets, with leading ones such as BlackRock's IBIT seeing discounts of nearly 1.8%. Cryptocurrencies had mixed performance Wednesday as the Federal Reserve eased concerns about potential rate hikes.
